title: delivery.rs: detect_quote_links called twice on same content
description: In process_batch (delivery.rs), detect_quote_links(&processed_html) is called at line 218 to populate tag_json, then called again at line 245 to extract quoteUrl. The second call re-runs the regex on the full HTML. These two calls should be merged: call once, store result, use it for both tag_json extension and quoteUrl extraction. As written, any CPU cost or future side-effects of the function are doubled per delivery item.
close_reason: Duplicate of broadside-3mgw.3 (same detect_quote_links called twice finding).
